pass_score.name: Pass score
pass_score.description: Number of fruit a round must slice to count as a pass. The round keeps going past it for score, so a high bar is fine.

lives.name: Lives
lives.description: Starting lives. A missed fruit costs one. Slicing a bomb ends the round immediately.

spawn_rate.name: Spawn rate
spawn_rate.description: How many fruit launch per second. Higher means a busier field.

gravity.name: Gravity
gravity.description: Downward pull on the arc, in units per second squared. Higher means faster, snappier arcs.

hazard_chance.name: Bomb chance
hazard_chance.description: Probability a launched object is a bomb instead of fruit. Slicing one ends the round, so keep this above zero for bot resistance (0 disables bombs entirely).

sound.name: Sound effects
sound.description: Play slice / miss / verify sound effects. Players can also toggle sound with the in-game mute button.

show_score.name: Show score
show_score.description: Display the live sliced count in the header.

show_lives.name: Show lives
show_lives.description: Display the remaining-lives indicator in the header.
